title: ECIL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ECIL is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
